case_title: WONG SUNNY DBA PRESTIGE CHINESE TEAS CO. VS SING TAO NEWSPAPERS OF S.F. LTD. C/O TIM LAU

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $412.89 FILED BY SING TAO NEWSPAPERS OF S.F. LTD. C/O TIM LAU AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT WONG SUNNY DBA PRESTIGE CHINESE TEAS CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
INVALID SERVICE AS TO WONG SUNNY, MAILING NOT DONE THRU SMALL CLAIMS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG SUNNY DBA PRESTIGE CHINESE TEAS CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SING TAO NEWSPAPERS OF S.F. LTD. C/O TIM LAU $412.89 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $462.89 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SING TAO NEWSPAPERS OF S.F. LTD. C/O TIM LAU
POS ON SUBPOENA TO TIM LAU (SING TAO NEWSPAPER) FILED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WONG SUNNY DBA PRESTIGE CHINESE TEAS CO. AS TO DEFENDANT SING TAO NEWSPAPERS OF S.F. LTD. C/O TIM LAU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SING TAO NEWSPAPERS OF S.F. LTD. C/O TIM LAU IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT WONG SUNNY DBA PRESTIGE CHINESE TEAS CO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SING TAO NEWSPAPERS OF S.F. LTD. C/O TIM LAU
